name: validate-all: when a source file fails validation its rules are excluded from the aggregator output (file flagged, rules withheld)
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: bad
rules: [{id: g-x-001, name: x}]
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > tree/google/bad.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --validate-first --format json 2>out.json && node -e 'const r=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));const ids=r.rules.map(x=>x.id);if(!ids.includes("g-x-001")){process.stderr.write("ok excluded
")}else{process.stderr.write("FAIL
");process.exit(1)}'
